calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Perry Perry in pro per. Price Perry was also present.

Ms. Perry informed the Court that there is a co-op, that there is a share of $695.00, that it increases 1% every month, and that they are attempting to have it transferred. The Court informed Ms. Perry that she could execute the transfer by affidavit instead of going through the process involving a probate referee, that she should look at Probate Code section 13100, that she would need to prepare a Probate Code 13100 declaration, and that she should contact the California State Bar Association to find someone that is knowledgable with regard to Probate matters. The Court ordered the matter off calendar but informed Ms. Perry that she could add the matter back on calendar if she ran into problems.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
